---
title: "Stimulating the brain"
subtitle: "Visual and TMS-evoked potentials"
jupyter: python3
---

## Goals

- TODO: configure a Jansen–Rit network
- TODO: deliver a focal stimulus (visual / TMS)
- TODO: extract evoked potentials and compare to references

## Setup

```{python}
# TODO: imports
```

## Build the JR network

```{python}
# TODO: instantiate model, connect via connectome
```

## Configure the stimulus

```{python}
# TODO: spatial pattern + temporal waveform
```

## Run and extract evoked responses

```{python}
# TODO: simulate, average across trials, plot ERPs
```

## Exercises

- TODO: vary stimulus intensity and locate the response threshold
- TODO: compare visual vs. TMS-like protocols
